---
name: Bug report
about: Report incorrect behavior, crashes, or non-deterministic output.
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal
State what should happen instead of the bug.

## Motivation
Describe the impact/severity and why it should be fixed.

## Files affected
List known or suspected files/areas involved.

- `src/...`

## Acceptance criteria
Define how the bug fix will be validated.

- [ ] Reproduction steps documented
- [ ] Fix implemented
- [ ] Regression test added

## Example code (optional)
Share a minimal reproducible input and observed output.

```vale
// Optional reproduction snippet
```
